findings.desc: BUG-1: Single-char quote input -> ArgumentOutOfRangeException (IndexOf(char,1,-1)). Formalised in Lean: BUG_1_single_char_quote_model_safe.
BUG-2: Single-char double-quote input -> range exception (input[1..^1] invalid for length-1 string).
Unclosed opening quote at start silently discards all input content.
Adjacent quoted strings emit 2 tokens not 1. Closing quote triggers yield+reset.
Empty option name not rejected: '--:value' produces currentOption='' silently.

lean_setup.note: Mathlib removed from lakefile.toml; all proofs use Lean core tactics (simp, split, native_decide). elan installed via Python tarfile extraction since shell tar/sha256sum restricted by runner sandbox.
lean_setup.elan_install_method: python3: urllib.request.urlretrieve then tarfile.extractall then subprocess.run([elan-init, -y, --default-toolchain, leanprover/lean4:v4.14.0])
